### `{r} sR$headings$antibiotic_utilisation`

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeIntroductionTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-antibiotic-utilisation.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeMethodsTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-antibiotic-utilisation.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-antibiotic-utilisation
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table) &&
    sum(benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {

  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table)

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table

  # Map AWaRe factor to inline badge (HTML) or letter (PDF)
  aware_colors <- c(A = "#6eb43d", W = "#fddf01", R = "#ee2d24")
  aware_text_colors <- c(A = "white", W = "black", R = "white")
  tbl_data <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      aware = dplyr::case_match(
        as.character(.data$aware),
        "WHO_AWARE_ACCESS" ~ "A",
        "WHO_AWARE_WATCH" ~ "W",
        "WHO_AWARE_RESERVE" ~ "R",
        .default = ""))

  if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
    tbl_data <- tbl_data |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        aware = dplyr::if_else(
          .data$aware != "",
          paste0(
            '<span style="display:inline-block;width:18px;height:18px;',
            'border-radius:50%;background:', aware_colors[.data$aware],
            ';color:', aware_text_colors[.data$aware],
            ';text-align:center;line-height:18px;font-weight:bold;',
            'font-size:11px">', .data$aware, '</span>'),
          ""))
  }

  cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 33, has_reference = has_reference, n_w = 10)
  ci_pattern <- ci_pattern_default

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_own"),
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref"))

  ci_cols_to_drop <- character(0)
  if (!include_rate_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own")
  if (!include_pooled_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")
  if (!include_quartile_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop,
      "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
      "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
      "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")
  if (length(ci_cols_to_drop) > 0)
    tbl <- tbl |> dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(ci_cols_to_drop))

  gt_tbl <- tbl |>
    gt(rowname_col = "display_name") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(
      c("row_id", "atc5_group", "row_type"))) |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = cw$font_size,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = !c(sR$table_headers$n, "aware"),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    gt::fmt_markdown(columns = "aware")

  # Move AWaRe column right after stub and set column widths
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    gt::cols_move(columns = "aware", after = 1) |>
    gt::cols_label(aware = sR$aware) |>
    cols_width(
      stub() ~ pct(cw$stub - 3),
      "aware" ~ pct(3),
      sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
      sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate %||% cw$pooled),
      tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$pooled) ~ pct(cw$pooled),
      tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q1) ~ pct(cw$q),
      tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q2) ~ pct(cw$q),
      tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q3) ~ pct(cw$q))

  # Bold ATC5 rows, indent substance rows
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_stub(rows = tbl_data$row_type == "atc5")) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = tbl_data$row_type == "atc5")) |>
    tab_stub_indent(
      rows = tbl_data$row_type == "substance",
      indent = 5)

  # Own rate CI merge
  if (include_rate_ci && "ci_lower_own" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$rate, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data[[if ("pooled_own" %in% names(tbl_data)) "pooled_own" else "rate"]]))
  } else if ("ci_lower_own" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = c("ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own"))
  }

  # Pooled reference rate CI merge
  if (has_reference && include_pooled_ci &&
      "ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_ref))
  } else if ("ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(
      columns = tidyselect::any_of(c("ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")))
  }

  # Quartile bootstrap CI merge
  if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
    if (include_quartile_ci) {
      has_boot <- !is.na(gt_tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower_ref"]])
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot)
    } else {
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
    }
  }

  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    tab_spanner(
      label = sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$exposure_density_rate,
      columns = tidyselect::any_of(
        c(sR$table_headers$rate,
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)),
      id = "exposure_density_rate"
    )

  if (has_reference) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(sR$table_headers$pooled,
            sR$table_headers$q1,
            sR$table_headers$q2,
            sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled),
        placement = "right")
  }

  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels()
      )
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        paste0(
          "$$\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$exposure_density_rate,
          "} = \\frac{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$substance_days,
          "}}{\\text{",
          sR$patient_days,
          "}} \\times ",
          format(100L),
          "$$"
        )),
      locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "exposure_density_rate"),
      placement = "right"
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n),
      placement = "right") |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$atc_footnote,
          "[whocc.no/atc_ddd_index/](https://www.whocc.no/atc_ddd_index/)")),
      locations = cells_stub(rows = tbl_data$row_type == "atc5"),
      placement = "right") |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$aware_column_footnote,
          "[aware.essentialmeds.org](https://aware.essentialmeds.org/)")),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "aware"),
      placement = "right") |>
    tab_source_note(source_note = sR$aware_combination_therapy_footnote)

  if (has_reference) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$rate_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$rate),
        locations = cells_column_labels(
          columns = tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$rate)),
        placement = "right")
  }

  # Sparse-data footnote for N < sparse_threshold
  if (any(!is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    fn_text <- if (include_rate_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
    fn_text <- glue::glue(fn_text, threshold = sparse_threshold)
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(
        footnote = fn_text,
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = sR$table_headers$n,
          rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold),
        placement = "right")
  }

  gt_tbl
} else {
  no_data_table(sR$`tbl-antibiotic-utilisation`$no_data)
}
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeOutlierInterpretation)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
if (exists("has_reference") && has_reference &&
    !is.null(benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table)) {
  # ATC5-level outlier interpretation using metric_registry
  states <- metric_registry$antibiotic_utilisation_table
  if (!is.null(states) && has_outliers(states)) {
    # Filter to ATC5 rows only
    atc5_rows <- benchmark_data$antibiotic_utilisation_table |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$row_type == "atc5")
    atc5_states <- states[names(states) %in% atc5_rows$row_id]

    if (has_outliers(atc5_states)) {
      # Look up display names from the table data
      name_lookup <- stats::setNames(atc5_rows$display_name, atc5_rows$row_id)

      above <- names(atc5_states[atc5_states == "above_q3"])
      below <- names(atc5_states[atc5_states %in% c("below_q1", "zero")])

      sections <- character(0)
      if (length(above) > 0) {
        labels <- unname(name_lookup[above])
        bullets <- paste(paste("-", labels), collapse = "\n")
        sections <- c(sections, paste(
          sR$outlier$framing_above_q3, bullets, sep = "\n\n"))
      }
      if (length(below) > 0) {
        labels <- unname(name_lookup[below])
        bullets <- paste(paste("-", labels), collapse = "\n")
        sections <- c(sections, paste(
          sR$outlier$framing_below_q1, bullets, sep = "\n\n"))
      }

      if (length(sections) > 0) {
        cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
        cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
        cat(paste(sections, collapse = "\n\n"), "\n")
        cat(":::\n")
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```
